event: Crown Prince Friedrich Wilhelm of Prussia during the Battle of Sedan
description: A group of military officers in Prussian uniforms stand atop a sandy hilltop observing the battlefield. At center, an officer looks through binoculars while others stand nearby in various poses of attention and command. In the foreground, a soldier kneels on the ground and another officer in green stands with a sword. To the right, artillery pieces and more soldiers are partially visible. Smoke or haze fills the distant background, suggesting active combat.

_meta.title: Kronprinz Friedrich Wilhelm Von Preussen Wahrend Der Schlacht Von Sedan
